CREQ_inventory_error.title: InventoryError hierarchy
CREQ_inventory_error.content: The module shall expose InventoryError as the base class for all inventory-related failures.

CREQ_inventory_load.title: load_items reads inventory from disk
CREQ_inventory_load.content: The function load_items shall return a list of records parsed from the given path.

CREQ_inventory_save.title: save_items persists inventory
CREQ_inventory_save.content: The function save_items shall write the given items to the given path and return True on success.

CREQ_inventory_client.title: InventoryClient connects to the backend
CREQ_inventory_client.content: The class InventoryClient shall expose connect() for backend session establishment.
